supersede_reason: v1 halted on the pre-registered flat gate: open->T-20 is ~40% flat by NET DISPLACEMENT across all three solid tiers. That is a dimensional category error, not a no-edge verdict: a resting maker bid is a PATH-triggered instrument (fills on excursion/reach, not endpoint). v1 measured the wrong instrument. v2 makes fill-reach-at-depth the primary instrument and the harvest-vs-drift falsification the headline gate.
purpose: Pre-registered dimensional frame + thresholds for the range-stack ENTRY banding test, on the correct (path/excursion) instrument. Committed BEFORE CC builds or runs, same goalpost-discipline as the exit gate and v1.

corpus_binding.note: Run executes against the data foundation SHA 372a659 (two-period travel on the verified T-4h-vicinity OPEN anchor, per-cell sand-pooled). open_anchor = closest traded Kalshi print to T-240 within [180,300] min; NOT running-mid, NOT first-ever print. The null's marginal density and the run corpus must be the SAME foundation SHA.

WTA_CHALL.reason: FV wired (BetExplorer challenger-women-singles, commit a4659b2) but 3/7 forward-only coverage; historical gap open. Insufficient corpus to band.
WTA_CHALL.revisit_condition: Re-include via its own re-freeze once FV backfills to ATP_CHALL-comparable depth.

instrument.primary_definition: For a rested maker bid at depth X below the open_anchor: (1) fill-reach = did the traded price touch X during open->T-20 (first-passage occurrence); (2) touch-depth distribution = how far below anchor the fill actually occurred (the discount captured), measured as a distribution, NOT a binary.
instrument.rationale: A resting maker bid fills on the PATH (did price visit), not the endpoint (where price ended). Net displacement answers a question the fill mechanism never asks.

demoted_to_control.net_displacement: CONTROL/CONDITIONING variable, not primary. Used only as the harvest-vs-drift discriminator (see headline_gate). A ~40% net-flat window is NOT evidence for or against edge — edge is a fill-conditional quantity.
demoted_to_control.path_excursion_and_realized_vol: EXPLANATORY COVARIATES (generators of fill-reach), not the edge themselves.

instrument.fill_depth_grid_note: Reach/touch-depth measured at each depth X on this grid, per price-level cell, per tier.

mandatory_dimensions.1_fill_reach_at_depth: PRIMARY gating instrument — no touch, no entry.
mandatory_dimensions.2_touch_depth_distribution: PRIMARY edge magnitude — distribution of realized fill discount, not touch indicator.
mandatory_dimensions.3_first_passage_timing_rel_T20: WHEN the touch occurs relative to T-20 — determines the state (recovered vs still-underwater) handed to the exit surface. First-passage TIME, not just occurrence.
mandatory_dimensions.4_conditional_forward_reach_to_exit_trig: MANDATORY composition dimension — given a fill at depth X, does the forward path reach the VALIDATED exit-surface trigger band? Entry must COMPOSE with the locked exit surface, never measured in isolation.

headline_gate.name: harvest_vs_drift_falsification
headline_gate.conditioning: ALL statistics computed on the FILLED population (is_taker=FALSE ground truth), NOT on all legs.
headline_gate.partition: A52 triggered-vs-held, applied to the TOUCH/FILL event

definitions.benign_reverter: Filled on an oscillation low; forward path reaches the exit trigger (A52 'triggered' partition — clean; harvest is real here).
definitions.adverse_drifter: Filled on the leading edge of a move continuing to a worse settlement (A52 'held-to-settlement' partition — contaminated; harvest illusory here).

headline_gate.test: On the selection-corrected fill population: HARVEST holds iff (benign_mass * benign_capture) > (adverse_mass * adverse_loss).
headline_gate.reject_rule: Harvest thesis REJECTED at a cell/band if (adverse_mass * adverse_loss) >= (benign_mass * benign_capture).
headline_gate.discriminator_rule: Edge MUST concentrate at net_displacement ~= 0 (harvest). If edge appears ONLY at net_displacement < 0, it is drift/FLB and REJECTED — that is the documented loss zone, not an entry edge.

selection_correction_two_stage.note: Single IPW stage (v1) is INSUFFICIENT for excursion. Excursion couples survivorship and signal more tightly than net did, AND adds outcome-conditioning on the fill event.

stage_a_endpoint_survivorship_IPW.problem: Legs printing at both ends over-represent movers; for excursion, 'printed-because-flow' and 'high-excursion' are the SAME cause — inflates apparent fill-reach.
stage_a_endpoint_survivorship_IPW.method: IPW on endpoint-survival, 3-tier covariate degradation (highest tier with >=90% non-missing among survivors): T1 {open_anchor_price_level, tier, liquidity_proxy}; T2 {open_anchor_price_level, tier}; T3 {open_anchor_price_level}.
stage_a_endpoint_survivorship_IPW.weight: 1/pi_hat stabilized, normalized to survivor N, winsorized 1st/99th pct, effective-N reported, missing-covariate legs NOT dropped (tier steps down).

stage_b_dip_selection_on_fill.problem: The FILLED subset is selected by the dip that fills you, which is informative about settlement (the A52/Q2 endogeneity). Net displacement never faced this because it never characterized the fill-conditional forward path.
stage_b_dip_selection_on_fill.method: Partition fills triggered-vs-held per A52 using exchange is_taker GROUND TRUTH on the touch/fill event — NOT the entry_mode tag (which mislabeled 80 fallback-taker fills as resting_maker). Report benign vs adverse mass on the corrected fill population. Forward-reach (dim 4) measured separately per partition; the held/adverse partition is where dip-selection correction is mandatory.

null_model.inherits_from_v1: Width-preserving position-shuffle on the measured marginal density; 10000 permutations per tier per range-object; FLB drift sign baked into the null.
null_model.instrument_change: Permutation statistic is now FILL-REACH-AT-DEPTH overlap (path-based), NOT net-displacement range overlap. Reach computed on the same excursion/path series the foundation provides.
null_model.flat_leg_handling: Net-flat legs are NOT excluded here (that was the v1 error). A net-flat leg with high excursion is a PRIMARY subject of v2. Flat = net <=1c is recorded as a CONTROL label only.
null_model.refused: NO banding verdict may be computed on UNCONDITIONAL excursion. Any reach/excursion statistic feeding a band decision MUST be on the filled, two-stage-corrected, A52-partitioned population. Unconditional-excursion banding is the mirror-image of the v1 net-displacement error and is explicitly out of bounds.

band_threshold.stage_1_per_cell: observed fill-reach overlap > null_99th_percentile at that cell
band_threshold.band_definition: contiguous run >=2 cells surviving stage1 + FDR AND passing the headline harvest-vs-drift gate
band_threshold.singletons: reported as weak signals, not bands

range_objects.note: B (open->T-20) is the actionable window; A is the convergence check. Band must clear in both AND pass the headline gate.

final_advancement_rule: A band advances to band-config ONLY if: (1) fill-reach overlap significant in A_INTERSECT_B after FDR q=0.05, (2) BOTH selection stages applied (endpoint IPW + A52 dip-selection on the fill, is_taker ground truth), (3) HEADLINE harvest-vs-drift gate PASSES: benign_mass*capture > adverse_mass*loss, (4) edge concentrates at net~=0 (harvest) not net<0 (drift/FLB), (5) conditional forward-reach COMPOSES with the validated exit surface, (6) harvest gate stable across CPCV held-out folds.
goalpost_lock: All thresholds frozen at this commit. No parameter re-chosen after results observed. Chosen IPW covariate tier and fill_depth_grid logged at run start and locked. UNCONDITIONAL-excursion banding is permanently out of bounds.
